description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and brown, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. A prominent feature is the open terrace area with a tree growing through it, adding a touch of nature to the urban structure. The house includes a covered entryway supported by two columns and a mix of solid and open wall sections. The rear and side facades display a combination of narrow vertical and horizontal windows, enhancing natural light and visual interest. The structure sits on a green lawn base, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white facade, and asymmetrical windows, featuring a terrace with a tree and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered entryway with two columns, terrace with a tree, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, white facade with asymmetrical vertical and horizontal windows and the tree on the terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with fewer windows and the tree visible on the roof terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, tree, and a mix of brown and white wall sections with additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of vertical and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with two columns, flat overhang, and a minimalist door design
